2606.24597.title: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
2606.24597.paper_summary: A world model predicts environment dynamics based on current observations and actions, serving as a core cognitive mechanism for reasoning and planning. In this work, we investigate how world modeling based on language models can further push the boundaries of general agents. (i) We first focus on building foundation models for agentic environment simulation. We introduce Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B and Qwen-AgentWorld-397B-A17B, the first language world models capable of simulating agentic environments covering 7 domains via long chain-of-thought reasoning. Leveraging more than 10M environment interaction trajectories of 7 domains in real-world environments, we develop Qwen-AgentWorld through a three-stage training pipeline: CPT injects general-purpose world modeling capabilities from the state transition dynamics and augmented professional corpora, SFT activates next-state-prediction reasoning, and RL sharpens simulation fidelity through a tailored framework with hybrid rubric-and-rule rewards. To evaluate language world models, we present AgentWorldBench, a comprehensive benchmark constructed from real-world interactions of 5 frontier models on 9 established benchmarks. Empirical results demonstrate that Qwen-AgentWorld significantly outperforms existing frontier models. (ii) Beyond foundation models, we further investigate two complementary paradigms through which world modeling enhances general agents. First, as a decoupled environment simulator, Qwen-AgentWorld supports scalable and controllable simulation of thousands of real-world environments for agentic RL, yielding gains that surpass real-environment training alone. Second, as a unified agent foundation model, world-model training acts as a highly effective warm-up that improves downstream performance across 7 agentic benchmarks. Code: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen-AgentWorld
2606.24597.paper_summary_zh: 一個世界模型根據當前的觀察和行動預測環境動態，作為推理和規劃的核心認知機制。在這項工作中，我們研究基於語言模型的世界建模如何進一步推動通用代理的邊界。<lb/> (i) 我們首先專注於為代理環境模擬構建基礎模型。我們介紹了 Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B 和 Qwen-AgentWorld-397B-A17B，這是第一個能夠通過長鏈思維推理來模擬涵蓋 7 個領域的代理環境的語言世界模型。利用來自現實世界環境中 7 個領域的超過 1000 萬個環境互動軌跡，我們通過三階段的訓練流程開發了 Qwen-AgentWorld：CPT 從狀態轉移動態和增強的專業語料庫中注入通用世界建模能力，SFT 激活下一狀態預測推理，RL 通過具有混合評分和規則獎勵的定制框架來提高模擬的真實性。為了評估語言世界模型，我們提出了 AgentWorldBench，這是一個基於 5 個前沿模型在 9 個已建立基準上的真實世界互動構建的綜合基準。實證結果表明，Qwen-AgentWorld 顯著超越現有的前沿模型。<lb/> (ii) 除了基礎模型，我們進一步研究兩種互補範式，通過這些範式，世界建模增強了通用代理。首先，作為一個解耦的環境模擬器，Qwen-AgentWorld 支持可擴展和可控的數千個現實世界環境的模擬，用於代理強化學習，產生的收益超過了僅僅在現實環境中的訓練。其次，作為一個統一的代理基礎模型，世界模型訓練作為一個高度有效的熱身，改善了在 7 個代理基準上的下游性能。<lb/> 代碼: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen-AgentWorld
2606.24597.author: Yuxin Zuo et.al.
